title: Wood Harvesting Challenge
description: A challenge where bots coordinate to gather wood and craft basic tools.
objectives: Assemble and place the crafting table

bots.name: LumberjackBob
bots.goal: Move to oak logs, harvest them, and tell Sally when finished

bots.name: CrafterSally
bots.goal: Ask Bob for wood, receive planks, and place a crafting table
